emails.subject: NDA with CitiFX -- progress check
emails.body: NDA with CitiFX progress check Tana: Any contact from Citi on the NDA? Thanks, Mike

emails.subject: RE: NDA with CitiFX -- progress check
emails.body: RE: NDA with CitiFX progress check No, the last note I have is proving the revised NDA for you to send to them. No word since then.

emails.subject: RE: NDA with CitiFX -- progress check
emails.body: Tana: I just talked to Scott Freeman; he said his lawyer Bob Klein sent you a few minor comments a week or so ago. Have you received these? If not, please feel free to call Bob at 212-816-3336. Thanks, Mike

emails.subject: RE: NDA with CitiFX -- progress check
emails.body: I just agreed to the changes on the phone with Bob Klein and am going to finalize the agreement and fax it to him tomorrow and then follow-up with originals.

emails.subject: RE: NDA with CitiFX -- progress check
emails.body: Tana: Thanks; please let me know when it's ready to sign. Mike
